programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: Cancelled: The boys get a sense of deja vu as Cartman again has an anal probe, but they soon realise they're actually stuck in some kind of re-run - Earth is just a reality show for aliens! (S7, E01)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: Fat Butt and Pancake Head: When Cartman wins a diversity event with his offensive hand puppet impersonation of Jennifer Lopez, Kyle is enraged. Soon the real J-Lo turns up, mightily peeved! (S7, E05)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: Lil' Crime Stoppers: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny decide to play detective; they go around the town solving minor "crimes" for a dollar. It's not long before they're busting meth labs! (S7, E06)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 707
programme.desc: Red Man's Greed: When the entire town is bought out by a Native American casino, the boys come up with a plan to get their homes back - but is more gambling really the solution? (S7, E07)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 708
programme.desc: South Park is Gay! The TV show Queer Eye For The Straight Guy is sweeping the nation and the men of South Park are embracing metrosexuality, but what evil plan are the hosts plotting? (S7, E08)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: Christian Hard Rock: The boys form a band called Moop, but disagree on what direction they should take. Cartman leaves the band and bets them he will have a platinum record first! (S7, E09)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: Casa Bonita: Cartman is overjoyed at going to a Mexican restaurant for Kyle's birthday but is crushed when he finds out Butters is invited instead. He'll have to make Butters "disappear". (S7, E11)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 712
programme.desc: All About The Mormons: A new family moves to South Park and their son Gary is an unusually perfect Mormon - this angers the boys no end! Will Stan beat him up or go for a family dinner?! (S7, E12)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: Butt Out: When the boys' smoking leads to a nasty incident, it's the cigarettes that are blamed rather than them. Cue the glutinous Rob Reiner to arrive in town with his anti-smoking lobby! (S7, E13)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: Raisins: When Wendy breaks up with Stan he takes it hard. The boys decide to take him to the restaurant Raisins, where all of the employees are preteen girls who enjoy wearing heavy make-up. (S7, E14)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The children of South Park are attracted to "Mr. Jefferson," the new neighbor in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get "Mr. Jefferson" to love him best.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall-Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: The Passion of the Jew: After seeing 'The Passion of the Christ' a zealous Cartman taunts Kyle. When Stan and Kenny see it, they hate it and harass a crazed Mel Gibson for their money back! (S8, E03)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: You Got F'd in the A: The boys get 'served' by some kids from the O.C. so now 'it's on!'. Stan puts together a dance troupe who must compete in the dance-off. Will Randy's moves save them? (S8, E04)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When Ms. Barch assigns lab partners for a behavioral science project, Daria is paired with disinterested jock Kevin, and Brittany is paired with the sleazy Upchuck.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 11

programme.desc: Stimpy's nose goblin, Frank Snotra, becomes famous. However when he's ready to perform, he gets stage fright. The side kick union is going on a massive strike and Stimpy is alerted.

programme.desc: When Helen takes the family on a trip to look good for her boss, they find themselves subjected to intense psychotherapy to unearth their problems.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Wooldoor discovers the healing powers of his bodily fluids. Ling-Ling finds love.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 411
programme.desc: A strange series of coincidences convinces Quinn that she has a guardian angel looking out for her, and Brittany's parents throw a party to celebrate her grades.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 11

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Rumors begin to swirl at school when a mysterious rash sends Daria to the hospital.

programme.desc: The roommates get a surprise family visitor. Toot, Wooldoor and Xandir abuse Ling-Ling.

programme.desc: When the roommates depart for a trip to the mall, Clara assumes they've been Raptured.

programme.desc: Becker had an ethical decision to make with one of his patients and Reggie is proposed to on her second date with a man. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 16

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 17

programme.desc: A botched prisoner transport has Andy and Swarek in a cat-and-mouse game to catch the fugitive.

programme.desc: Andy’s ex-cop father has confessed that he may have committed a crime during an alcohol-induced blackout.

programme.desc: Paddy Meehan has a personal connection in the case of a missing two-year-old. As the story develops, she believes it could provide a much-needed break in her quest to become a reporter.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 5

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The uber glam world of Essex will act as the backdrop to the series: nail bars, wine bars, spray tans, flash cars, big watches – these people live it large and just can’t get enough drama into their lives.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1303

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1307

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1308
programme.desc: It's Holly's birthday and she gets a massive surprise when Kyle shows up. Marty goes in on Chloe but takes it too far. Meanwhile, Aaron and Marnie's relationship reaches breaking point. (S13, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1309

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1310
programme.desc: In the series finale Chloe and Marty get flirty again, but can they really stay just good friends? Kyle gets some big news from Boss Anna, but the fallout will change the family forever. (S13, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: It all kicks off when eight Geordies become housemates. Vicky can't decide if she prefers Jay or Greg, Greg wants to leave, and Holly, the only housemate in a relationship, is unfaithful.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Jay's aware that he's bitten off more than he can chew with Vicky, Charlotte fights off advances from Gaz, whilst Sophie gets the shock of her life when her parents turn up unannounced.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 103

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Holly makes a surprise return to the Geordie Shore house, but not before Jay and Gaz face their toughest work assignment at a working man's club. Anna pushes Vicky too far.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 206

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The roommates deal with the aftermath of the fight. Angelina starts dating Jose, a guy from the club; Jenni and Snooki clean up the smush room in preparation for Snooki's hook-up. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 10

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 17

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 18

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Spencer and Heidi ignore the concerns of their families and runaway to Mexico to elope. Whitney takes a chance at a dream job in New York City and says goodbye to Lauren and her life in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: When Lauren and Heidi have a run-in, they put their feud aside and remember why they used to be friends. Spencer and Heidi deal with fallout of their elopment and Justin shocks Audrina when he whisks her away to Palm Springs.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When Leah's bucket full of beach treasures floats into the vast ocean, Leah summons Shimmer and Shine to help her retrieve the loot.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 5

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Zeta steals the amazing Glitter Genie's staff. If the girls don't get it back in time, the Glitter Genie's palace will disappear! / When the girls discover a blank gem, they take it to meet the Gem Princess who gives each gem its power.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 208

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: In the sky above Animal Island, a remarkable race is about to begin. But before Blaze can join, he must spread his wings!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 3

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 15

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Puppies Galore: Dora, Boots, Benny, and a stroller full of rambunctious puppies rush to save their puppy friend, Little Boots, before he wakes up a bear.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 107

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 3
